## Checklist

### SKILL.md
- [ ] Frontmatter block present (name, description, version, author)
- [ ] Single clear purpose
- [ ] Step-by-step instructions Claude can follow
- [ ] Output format specified
- [ ] Self-check / validation section included
- [ ] Tested minimum 3 times with different inputs

### README.md
- [ ] What it does
- [ ] Who it's for
- [ ] Requirements listed
- [ ] Step-by-step usage
- [ ] At least one example output linked
- [ ] Changelog present

### Examples
- [ ] At least 1 real output file in `examples/`
- [ ] No sensitive or personal data in examples

### General
- [ ] Folder named using kebab-case convention
- [ ] No broken links in README
- [ ] Tested on Claude Sonnet 4 or Opus 4
